Se eu quisesse digitalizar com a câmera do meu iPhone, eu utilizaria o Adobe Scan, que é o único aplicativo decente que faz isso. Tenho um aparelho que custou mais de R$ 1.000 e, nos EUA, não custa nem USD $ 150 e não posso sequer escanear com meu aparelho. HP nunca mais. Comprarei da concorrente onde eu possa utilizar o scanner pelo aplicativo. Cansei. Vocês deveriam ter vergonha.

Mise à jour 2026 :
Par la suite c’est moins rose: autant les impressions sont de bonne qualité, autant c’est souvent une galère avant de pouvoir en lancer une… je dois réouvrir les paramètres, retrouver l’imprimante, pourtant vue en wifi etc… 

Je viens d’installer mon imprimante HP Envy 4527. L’installation s’est bien passée en mode wifi sur mon routeur et les essais d’impression PC et smartphone via ce logiciel sont réussies. (Je suis pourtant blonde ^^!)
Tout est intuitif, j’ai trouvé l’option impression en noir et blanc seulement dans le menu, contrairement à un autre utilisateur et suis donc contente de mon achat et du logiciel pour le moment. Très déçue de ma précédente imprimante Brother, je tente maintenant l’aventure avec HP...
A suivre.

title: Exhausting
content: For years it was great. Simple format. Easy to use. Functional. Then came the fancy updates which made a mess. The Mac app never works so I gave up & stuck to the iPhone app which, for the last two weeks, has eaten up more time & caused more frustration than printing, scanning and faxing should. Significantly decreases production. It won’t progress past the loading screen. Delete, reinstall, then it couldn’t find the preexisting printer. Delete, reinstall, then it says the printer doesn’t have scan function, which it does, when setting up a fax. I just scanned for a fax a few days ago after several attempts. Please stop adding unnecessary functions to this app (ads for added services/tools/printers etc) when the base functions aren’t consistently usable.

author: timberlake_27
title: App davvero pessima
content:
Una app da una UI troppo pesante e poco usabile: avviare la app richiede più di un minuto, le stampanti si collegano dopo svariati minuti, il collegamento al serve hp avviene dopo troppo tempo.
Non vi è presente la Dashboard di instantink all’interno della app (e questo lo trovo un grande limite e sarebbe facilissimo da sviluppare). 
Aggiornamenti della app e dei firmware delle stampanti avvengono davvero di rado e questa è una grande falla della società che se ne frega della sicurezza degli utenti e del supporto dei prodotti, pensando solo al profitto sui servizi (che sono progettati malissimo). NON CI SIAMO!

author: EbonyAngel1
title: HP Printers—2nd to None!
content: Today I installed my new HP Envy Photo 7260r. It was almost too easy. HP has been my choice for the last 15 to 20 years, and there is no way I’d change. (I also have an HP Envy 5660 that just won’t quit. I’ll be donating it soon.) I’ve tried/used several other brands over the years, but none comes close to the ease of using an HP.  As stated setup is amazingly easy. Scanning is a breeze; the print quality is outstanding. Saving a document to a pdf from the print options is truly my favorite feature. Remote access is fantastic. Customer service is EXCELLENT: agents are knowledgeable and exceed expectations every time. Thank you HP. You are the BEST!

author: Neeluljhu
title: Ultra pénible pour les nerfs
content: Eh bien je vais laisser mon avis ! Si l’imprimante en soi (Envy) est bien meilleure que mon ancienne deskjet, la connection est un enfer et je me retiens souvent de ne pas taper un bon coup de poing dessus ou la jeter par la fenêtre ! Déjà, l’imprimante ne se met jamais vraiment en veille : cette nouille met des messages chaque fois que j’arrête le partage de connection mobile et reste allumée visiblement toute la nuit avec son message idiot. Par contre elle ne se reconnecte jamais automatiquement quand je remets le partage de données et que je veux imprimer 😬 et cet après-midi elle n’a pas imprimé toutes les pages souhaitées et… ne fait pas le travail bien que la connection soit là et que je relance une impression. En gros, ras le bol du binz HP ! Même les informations sur mon abonnement instant ink sont fausses et je déteste aussi le contrôle effectué par HP qui bloque toute impression si je ne suis pas connectée quelques jours (après des années de bon fonctionnement avec le même abonnement.

author: JackMediaComments
title: Everyone Hates Printers, and it’s HP’s fault
content: Printers have always been hated, but they used to have more hardware issues than software. Every time my mom needs to print or scan something this software is the issue. Required sign in is obviously a dark practice to sell user data, and it ruins the efficiency of the workflow. Then after complying to that privacy invasion, I am told “printer not responding” “scanner unavailable” and the solution is to restart? Anyone involved in planning, coding, and/or promoting this app should go on strike, and then just quit, for the betterment of society. If you rated this app above 2 stars, please include how much they are paying you. I’m so relieved that my generation never uses scanners or printers, I am excited for this company to go bankrupt and die. Shout out to the movie Office Space, I hate everything about printers and it’s their fault.
